summary: Evening cycle (#1243 #1241 queued). Two new fix PRs: #1243 (Copilot CLI MCP tool naming in AAB — closes dogfood #1209) and #1241 (release version gate + prepare-release script — closes #1239). PR #1237 closed as duplicate (17:30Z report was already merged as #1232). PR #1238 (heredoc invariant fix) is BEHIND and needs rebase. PR #1224 (site fix) merged this cycle. Persistent blockers: swarm health P0 (#1186, 4th cycle, human intervention required), KE-2 (#917) unstarted (4th cycle), observability-agent silent for 76h+ (#1235, new). AAB normalization gap (#1202) still unassigned — partially addressed by #1243 for Copilot MCP tools but root cause work still pending.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Copilot CLI MCP tools defaulting to unknown action type
dogfoodPatterns.description: PR #1243 queued: AAB now recognizes <server>-<method_with_underscores> naming convention and classifies as mcp.call. Previously caused false default-deny even with explicit allow rule.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Heredoc body triggering false governance-path match in no-governance-self-modification
dogfoodPatterns.description: PR #1238 queued: stripHeredocBody() now strips body content before scanning for governance file paths. Cat body content mentioning agentguard.yaml no longer triggers invariant.
Multiple copilot-driver agents report version as 'unknown' in governance denial telemetry.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Agents should read agentguard version at startup; likely missing --agent-version flag or VERSION file in copilot CLI hooks

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: agentguard policy suggest redirects to cloud silently
dogfoodPatterns.description: policy suggest silently redirects to cloud instead of running locally when no cloud token is present.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: DX squad: add --local flag or clear fallback message

dogfoodPatterns.description: Shell exec to sibling repos requires explicit allow rule. Read tool works. Behavior is as-designed.

crossCuttingIssues.title: Swarm Health P0 — 85.7% agents stuck (4th consecutive cycle)
crossCuttingIssues.description: 85.7% agent worktrees stuck. 12 stuck agents, 3 active. 133 enabled agents vs 32 max_workers (4× oversubscribed). 18 dead PID files. 2 cron collision groups. Escalated to director — no human action yet after 4 cycles.
crossCuttingIssues.action: URGENT — Human required: git worktree prune, /tmp/ PID cleanup, cron collision fix, confirm cron daemon running. No agent resolution path.

crossCuttingIssues.title: KE-2: ActionContext — unstarted, 4th consecutive cycle
crossCuttingIssues.description: 0/4 checkboxes, no assignee, no PR. Sprint goal includes KE-2 unblock. Now 4 consecutive cycles unstarted.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Escalated to kernel-sr last cycle. If no PR open by next cycle, escalate to squad lead and consider sprint goal re-scope.

crossCuttingIssues.title: AAB action-type normalization failure — 3,825+ unintended default-deny decisions
crossCuttingIssues.description: AAB failing to normalize a significant portion of tool calls. Partial fix for Copilot MCP tools via PR #1243, but root cause (broader unknown action type gap) still unaddressed.
crossCuttingIssues.action: PR #1243 addresses Copilot MCP subset. Kernel squad must still address remaining normalization failures per issue #1202.

crossCuttingIssues.title: observability-agent silent for 76h+ (threshold: 72h)
crossCuttingIssues.description: No observability report since 2026-03-25T10:09Z. Daily reports expected. Missing system health signal and anomaly detection coverage. Recovery controller auto-filed this issue.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Check scheduled trigger config. Re-trigger or reschedule if cron has dropped.

crossCuttingIssues.description: v2.9.0 GitHub release exists but npm package not published. PR #1241 adds prepare-release.sh to prevent recurrence. Still needs: delete bad tag + re-run with correct ordering.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Merge PR #1241. Then: human runs prepare-release.sh against corrected v2.9.0 commit or re-tags.
